## InMemoryCommandStatusStore Class

In\-memory implementation of [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Commands\.ICommandStatusStore](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/hexalith.eventstore.server.commands.icommandstatusstore 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Commands\.ICommandStatusStore') for testing\.
Simulates TTL expiry using stored expiration timestamps\.

```csharp
public sealed class InMemoryCommandStatusStore : Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Commands.ICommandStatusStore
```
